limitations: No quantified AI-specific capex or budget figures appear in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 based on named initiatives and named functions without dollar amounts or headcount figures.

Narrative concreteness scored 4 based on named deployed use cases (personalization, chatbots, agentic checkout, supply chain AI) with operational detail, but no quantified business results (e.g., % improvement, cost savings) were disclosed in the excerpts.
Promotional/forward-looking language present in MD&A section; concreteness score reflects described deployment status rather than confirmed outcomes.
